SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class AbstractLoopInvariantRule

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractLoopInvariantRule
All Implemented Interfaces:
BuiltInRule, Rule, HasOrigin, Named, Rule, RuleExecutor<Goal>
Direct Known Subclasses:
LoopScopeInvariantRule
public abstract class AbstractLoopInvariantRule extends Object implements BuiltInRule
An abstract super class for loop invariant rules. Extending rules should usually call doPreparations(Goal, RuleApp) directly at the beginning of the BuiltInRule.apply(Goal, RuleApp) method.
See Also:
  • LoopScopeInvariantRule
  • WhileInvariantRule

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    protected static final record 
    AbstractLoopInvariantRule.AdditionalHeapTerms
    A container with data for the additional terms with assertions about the heap; that is, the anonymizing update, the wellformed term, the frame condition and the reachable state formula.
    protected static class 
    AbstractLoopInvariantRule.AnonUpdateData
    A container containing data for the anonymizing update, that is the actual update and the anonymized heap.
    static final record 
    AbstractLoopInvariantRule.Instantiation
    A container for an instantiation of this LoopScopeInvariantRule application; contains the update, the program with post condition, the While loop the LoopScopeInvariantRule should be applied to, the LoopSpecification, the self JTerm.
    static final record 
    AbstractLoopInvariantRule.LoopInvariantInformation
    A container object containing the information required for the concrete loop invariant rules to create the sequents for the new goals.

    and(TermBuilder tb, JTerm t1, JTerm t2)

    Creates the "...Before_LOOP" update needed for the variant.

    AbstractLoopInvariantRule.LoopInvariantInformation
    doPreparations(Goal goal, RuleApp ruleApp)
    Constructs the data needed for the currently implemented loop invariants; also prepares the new set of goals, that is splitting the current goal is no longer required after calling this method.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractLoopInvariantRule

      public AbstractLoopInvariantRule()

  • Method Details

    • getNrOfGoals

      public abstract int getNrOfGoals()
      Returns:
      The number of generated goals by this invariant rule.

    • doPreparations

      public AbstractLoopInvariantRule.LoopInvariantInformation doPreparations(Goal goal, RuleApp ruleApp) throws RuleAbortException
      Constructs the data needed for the currently implemented loop invariants; also prepares the new set of goals, that is splitting the current goal is no longer required after calling this method.
      Parameters:
      goal - the Goal on which to apply ruleApp
      ruleApp - the rule application to be executed
      Returns:
      The AbstractLoopInvariantRule.LoopInvariantInformation object containing the data for the application of loop invariant rules.
      Throws:
      RuleAbortException

    • isApplicable

      public boolean isApplicable(Goal goal, PosInOccurrence pio)
      Description copied from interface: BuiltInRule
      Returning true iff a rule is applicable at the given position. This does not necessarily mean that a rule application will change the goal (this decision is made due to performance reasons)
      Specified by:
      isApplicable in interface BuiltInRule

    • isApplicableOnSubTerms

      public boolean isApplicableOnSubTerms()
      Specified by:
      isApplicableOnSubTerms in interface BuiltInRule

    • createApp

      public IBuiltInRuleApp createApp(PosInOccurrence pos, TermServices services)
      Specified by:
      createApp in interface BuiltInRule

      public String displayName()
      Specified by:
      displayName in interface Rule

    • createLocalAnonUpdate

      protected static JTerm createLocalAnonUpdate(ImmutableSet<LocationVariable> localOuts, Services services)
      Creates an update for the anonymization of all ProgramVariables in localOuts.
      Parameters:
      localOuts - The ProgramVariables to anonymize.
      services - The Services object.
      Returns:
      The anonymizing update.

    • conjunctInv

      protected static JTerm conjunctInv(Services services, AbstractLoopInvariantRule.Instantiation inst, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> atPres, List<LocationVariable> heapContext)
      Creates a conjunction of all invariant formulas for the LocationVariables in heapContext.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services object.
      inst - The AbstractLoopInvariantRule.Instantiation for this rule application.
      atPres - TODO
      heapContext - The heap formulas to create a conjunction of invariants for.
      Returns:
      A conjunction of all invariant formulas for the LocationVariables in heapContext.

    • conjunctFreeInv

      protected static JTerm conjunctFreeInv(Services services, AbstractLoopInvariantRule.Instantiation inst, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> atPres, List<LocationVariable> heapContext)
      Creates a conjunction of all free invariant formulas for the LocationVariables in heapContext.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services object.
      inst - The AbstractLoopInvariantRule.Instantiation for this rule application.
      atPres - TODO
      heapContext - The heap formulas to create a conjunction of free invariants for.
      Returns:
      A conjunction of all free invariant formulas for the LocationVariables in heapContext.

    • mapAndConjunct

      protected static <T> JTerm mapAndConjunct(Services services, Function<T,JTerm> fct, List<T> listOfT)
      Creates a conjunction of JTerms that are produced by fct from the elements in listOfT. fct may return null when applied to a T object; in this case, the result is ignored when constructing the conjunction.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services object.
      fct - A mapping from T objects to JTerms (formulas!).
      listOfT - A list of T objects.
      Returns:
      A conjunction of Terms produced by fct for all elements in listOfT.

    • prepareVariant

      protected static Pair<JTerm,JTerm> prepareVariant(AbstractLoopInvariantRule.Instantiation inst, JTerm variant, TermServices services)
      Creates the variant proof obligation and update.
      Parameters:
      inst - The AbstractLoopInvariantRule.Instantiation for this rule application.
      variant - The variant term as given by the loop specification.
      services - The Services object.
      Returns:
      The variant proof obligation and update.

    • splitUpdates

      protected static Pair<JTerm,JTerm> splitUpdates(JTerm focusTerm, TermServices services)
      Splits a term into the update and formula part.
      Parameters:
      focusTerm - The term to split into update and formula the update is applied to.
      services - The Services object.
      Returns:
      A pair of the update and the formula the update is applied to.

    • isModalityTerm

      protected static boolean isModalityTerm(JTerm progPost)
      Checks whether progPost contains a Java program.
      Parameters:
      progPost - The Term to check.
      Returns:
      true iff progPost (directly) contains a Java program.

    • and

      protected static JTerm and(TermBuilder tb, JTerm t1, JTerm t2)
      Creates a conjunction of t1 and t2 if both are not null, and returns t2 only if t1 is null.
      Parameters:
      tb - The TermBuilder object.
      t1 - The first formula of the conjunction; may be null.
      t2 - The second formula of the conjunction; may not be null.
      Returns:
      returns t2 if t1 is null and t1 & t2 if both aren't null.

    • instantiate

      protected static AbstractLoopInvariantRule.Instantiation instantiate(LoopInvariantBuiltInRuleApp app, Services services) throws RuleAbortException
      Constructs the AbstractLoopInvariantRule.Instantiation object containing the relevant parameters for this LoopScopeInvariantRule application.
      Parameters:
      app - The LoopInvariantBuiltInRuleApp object for the application of the LoopScopeInvariantRule.
      services - The Services object.
      Returns:
      The AbstractLoopInvariantRule.Instantiation object containing the relevant parameters for this LoopScopeInvariantRule application.
      Throws:
      RuleAbortException - If the LoopInvariantBuiltInRuleApp does not contain a LoopSpecification.

    • createAnonUpdate

      protected static AbstractLoopInvariantRule.AnonUpdateData createAnonUpdate(LocationVariable heap, JTerm modifiable, LoopSpecification inv, Services services)
      Computes the anonymizing update, the loop heap, the base heap, and the anonymized heap.
      Parameters:
      heap - The original heap LocationVariable.
      modifiable - The modifiable term.
      inv - The loop invariant.
      services - The Services object.
      Returns:
      An AbstractLoopInvariantRule.AnonUpdateData object encapsulating the anonymizing update, the loop heap, the base heap, and the anonymized heap.

    • createAdditionalHeapTerms

      protected static AbstractLoopInvariantRule.AdditionalHeapTerms createAdditionalHeapTerms(Services services, AbstractLoopInvariantRule.Instantiation inst, List<LocationVariable> heapContext, ImmutableSet<LocationVariable> localOuts, Map<LocationVariable,Map<JTerm,JTerm>> heapToBeforeLoop, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> atPres)
      Prepare anon update, wellformed formula, frame condition and reachable state formula.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services object.
      inst - The AbstractLoopInvariantRule.Instantiation of parameters for the LoopScopeInvariantRule app.
      heapContext - TODO
      localOuts - TODO
      heapToBeforeLoop - TODO
      atPres - TODO
      Returns:
      An AbstractLoopInvariantRule.AdditionalHeapTerms object containing the anonymized update, the wellformed formula, the frame condition formula, and the reachable state formula.
